ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the team */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium the team uses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the metric belongs to */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "record" TEXT /* Team record (wins-losses) */,
  "elo" TEXT /* Elo rating of the team */,
  "wins" TEXT /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" TEXT /* Number of losses */,
  "pt_diff" TEXT /* Points difference */,
  "offensive_rating" TEXT /* Offensive performance rating */,
  "defensive_rating" TEXT /* Defensive performance rating */,
  "turnover_differential" INTEGER /* Difference between turnovers gained and lost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the prediction belongs to */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the prediction model used */,
  "playoffs" TEXT /* Playoff probability */,
  "win_division" TEXT /* Division win probability */,
  "bye" TEXT /* Bye week probability */,
  "super_bowl" TEXT /* Super Bowl win probability */,
  "champs" TEXT /* Championship probability */,
  "confidence_score" TEXT /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoff_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playoff outcome */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the outcome belongs to */,
  "playoff_year" INTEGER /* Year of the playoff */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the playoff game */,
  "playoff_round" TEXT /* Round of the playoff (e.g., Wild Card, Divisional) */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the playoff game */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Indicates if the team was home or away */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_outcomes_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team roster */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the roster belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the coach started with the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the venue belongs to */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of playing surface */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venues_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
